meta.scenario_description: Missiles, fighters, UAVs, and a standoff bomber form a dense high-threat attack package.

enemies.label: T1
enemies.name: T1(BGM-109C-like low-altitude missile)
enemies.decision_reason: The missile is already in the terminal approach phase; priority is evasive maneuvering and interception.
enemies.core_features: low altitude, high speed, short range, small heading angle

enemies.label: T2
enemies.name: T2(AGM-86B-like shortcut missile)
enemies.decision_reason: The predicted flight path crosses the formation envelope, so interception and local evasion should be triggered.
enemies.core_features: attack course, very small shortcut, medium range

enemies.label: T3
enemies.name: T3(F-22 high-speed attack fighter)
enemies.decision_reason: A high-speed fighter with strong jamming can launch weapons while compressing the decision window.
enemies.core_features: high speed, strong interference, oblique attack

enemies.label: T4
enemies.name: T4(suicide UAV close attacker)
enemies.decision_reason: Although slow and cheap, the UAV is close enough to threaten the rear of the formation.
enemies.core_features: low speed, close range, self-destructive approach

enemies.label: T5
enemies.name: T5(B-52H standoff platform)
enemies.decision_reason: The platform can launch weapons outside the defense zone, so early positioning is preferred.
enemies.core_features: high altitude, medium speed, standoff platform

enemies.label: T6
enemies.name: T6(F-16C feint fighter)
enemies.decision_reason: The behavior resembles attack at first, but the later turn-away suggests deception rather than immediate strike.
enemies.core_features: high-speed approach followed by separation
